source_title: Arabinogalactan utilization in continuous cultures of Bifidobacterium longum effect of co-culture with Bacteroides thetaiotaomicron
notes: Co-culture evidence indicates B. thetaiotaomicron can support B. longum utilization of arabinogalactan in continuous culture.
